title: malus discoidea
intro: Malus discoidea, also known as the Chinese crabapple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Malus discoidea include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Malus discoidea include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
